caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 18 kt winds with 6.2 ft wave heights and a 57% rain probability, while St. Thomas is seeing 22 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in both the Western and Eastern Caribbean, with Grand Cayman being the top impact port due to the higher rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 20 kt winds with 4.5 ft wave heights and a 34% rain probability, while nearby ports have less severe conditions. Cadiz has relatively calm conditions with max winds of 12 kt and less than 10% rain probability, making it a more favorable destination today.
